titleStmt.title: SII 29.51: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 51. (A.R. No. B. 191 of 1962-63.) MADDURU, ALAMPUR TALUK, MAHABUBNAGAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Another slab lying in the ruined Fort.
The top portion of the slab in broken and lost. Perhaps this lost portion contained reference to the rule of Chālukya Tribhuvanamalladēva [Vikramāditya VI].

It records the gift of some plots of land mesasured by the Satya ratnākarana kōlu and made tax free in Maddūru and Rēkalūru to the god Chintaka-Rēchēśvara of rājadhāni Maddūru situated on the southern banks of the Tuṅgabhadrā in Ayje-300, for worship of the god, maintenance of the musicians and running a choultry by mahāsāmanta Pallavarasa of Puṇḍūr in the presence of Sōvarasa, Nāgimayya-nāyaka and the pradhānas. The donor bears such epithets as Muduguṇḍūr puravarēśvara, Alampura-bhujaṁga, etc. Also it contains another gift of land for the repairs of the temple, annadana etc.
The date of the first grant is Chālukya Vikrama year 13, Vibhava, Āśhādha, Lunar eclipse Thursday, corresponding to 1088 A.D., July 6, Thursday. Lunar eclipse occured on that day.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
dhigata paṁcamahāsabda mahāsāmanta vijayāThe slab is broken at the beginning and lost.
ṁ cāḷukya vaṁśōddhavanayōdhya siṁhāsana va
ṁ cana muduguṇḍūrppuravarēśvara dēsīyānē
vana siṁhāvaḷaṁpūrabhūjaṁga śrī bra
ra dēvapādārādhakaṁ satrubaḷasādhakaṁ
disamasta prasasti sahitaṁ śrīmanma
sāmantaṁ puṇḍūra pāllavarasa
rcāḷukya vikrama 13 neya vibhava saṁvatsara
da Āṣāḍada punname brahaspativā
ra sōmagrahaṇa nimityadiṁ Ayije
300 ṟa baḷiya rājadhāni maddūra teṁka
ṇa tuṁgabhadrā naditīradali cintaka rēcēśvara
dēvargge śrīpāllavarasanuṁyanubhavaṇi
kāṟaruṁ sōvarasanuṁ nāgimayya nāyaka
nuṁ samastavāda pradhānaru miḷdu dēvaraṁ
gabhōgakkaṁ gāndharvvarggaṁ bāḷdaygarggaṁ satrakkaṁ sa
rvvabādhā parihāra māge dhārāpūrvvakaṁ
māḍikoṭṭa datti satyaratnākaranakōlalu ma
ddūra poladoḷage matta 15 rēkulūra pola
doḷage matta 20 dēvaraṁga bhōgakke ma
ddūra keyimatta 15 ṟeseṭṭiya ma
ṇakyaThe end is broken and lost.

jīrnnōddhārakkaṁ A
nnadānakkaṁ pāvuḷakkaṁ malliya poladoḷage
satyaratnākarana kōlalu tṛbho
gābhyantara siddhiyiṁ sarvanamaśyamāgi
dhārāpūrvakaṁ mmāḍi koṭṭa matta 20Originally engraved as 15 and then corrected into 20.
vinti dharmmavaṁ sudharmmadiṁ prati pāḷisuvaru
vellūra baṭṭiyiṁ mūḍa .
Digital edition of SII 29.51 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
